name: Full-Funnel Journey Visibility
description: See where the funnel is leaking volume or velocity, and exactly how far each stage sits from benchmark, across marketing and sales.
alsoSurfaces: Where in the funnel is conversion under-performing benchmark?
Where is velocity stretching out and slowing pipeline?
How do this quarter's conversion rates compare to last?
Which segments have the worst leakage at which stages?
beforeWeRun: Stages: full marketing → sales funnel or sales-only?
Benchmark: internal trailing 4-quarter, or industry standard?
Segment slice: by source, persona, or region?

whatYoullGet.name: Funnel KPIs
whatYoullGet.desc: Volume and conversion rate at every stage with benchmark comparison.

whatYoullGet.name: Leakage map
whatYoullGet.desc: Stage-by-stage drop-off visualized with flags on the worst gaps.

whatYoullGet.name: Segment breakdowns
whatYoullGet.desc: Where conversion breaks down by source, persona, or geo.

whatYoullGet.name: Cohort comparison
whatYoullGet.desc: This quarter vs. last on the same view.

callout: 4 quick inputs, then Sage builds your funnel dashboard in ~10 min.
